inputs.label: Length (mm)

inputs.label: Width (mm)
inputs.businessContext: The width of the plate in millimeters.

businessContext_i18n.en: The width of the plate in millimeters.

inputs.label: Thickness (mm)
inputs.businessContext: The thickness of the plate in millimeters.

businessContext_i18n.en: The thickness of the plate in millimeters.

inputs.label: Material Density (kg/m³)
inputs.businessContext: Density of the plate material in kilograms per cubic meter.

businessContext_i18n.en: Density of the plate material in kilograms per cubic meter.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Plaka malzemesinin metreküp başına kilogram cinsinden yoğunluğu.

inputs.label: Material Cost per kg
inputs.businessContext: Unit cost of the material per kilogram in local currency.

businessContext_i18n.en: Unit cost of the material per kilogram in local currency.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Malzemenin kilogram başına birim maliyeti (yerel para birimi).

inputs.label: Manufacturing Overhead (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage overhead applied to material cost to cover manufacturing, labor, and other indirect costs.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage overhead applied to material cost to cover manufacturing, labor, and other indirect costs.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Malzeme maliyetine uygulanan ve üretim, işçilik ve diğer dolaylı maliyetleri karşılayan yüzde oranı.

inputs.label: Waste Factor (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of material expected to be wasted due to offcuts or defects.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of material expected to be wasted due to offcuts or defects.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kesim artıkları veya kusurlar nedeniyle israf edilmesi beklenen malzeme yüzdesi.
